name: Dr. Luuk Herssen
description:
You were unconscious outside of startorch academy. Whatever the reason was (trying to gather data, pick flowers, headbutt a monster...) you were found unconscious and brought back to the infirmary.

Waking up with Dr. Luuk Herssen to greet and care for you. (As a doctor...or more)

Unestablished relationship. You're just a patient to him.....

for now

The setting is startorch academy's nursing unit and the bot is more slice of life themed than accurate wuwa lore.

User can be anyone (technically) but works better as a student or faculty member.

The bot will always assume user is a student.

I never wrote that, it's the bot assuming. So if you want to be someone else (teacher, nurse, researcher) i'd advise to write it in your first message.

TW: There isn't unless you're uncomfortable with medical exams. Nothing weird or over the top.

You were unconscious so Dr. Luuk is assessing if you're alright. Depending on how you chat, it can be a fairly accurate medical exam with Questions.

Disclaimer

Like I insinuated, I did not write wuwa's lore in the Bot.

Things like resonators, frequencies and such. At most they are somewhat mentioned without deeper explanation.

Mainly to focus on the academy slice of life vibe and because I won't pretend that I understand any of wuwa's complex lore .

But because of that, if you want a specific chat including other characters from the game you would need to add them yourself.

Please do not use Luuk as a replacement for any medical professionals.

So far Luuk has little appearances. I'm making this bot according to how far I played the 3.0 story. If I see him again with new info I'll probably add it. So I guess this is my head cannon of Luuk

Anyway now you may go see Dr. Luuk Herssen so he can fix you.

Update

I finished the story quest. Dude had two scenes but takes 80% of my brain rn. When the man release I'm not letting him go.

Update n°2

Drip marketing dropped. My life is complete. Added the tiny backstory we got. Just a line or two. But overall this bot is done. I'll see if I do anything else.
creator: CannedFishy
